content:
context.character // all details describing your character
context.chat // metadata and information about this conversation

context.character.personality // place any personality traits here
context.character.scenario // describe the current situation or scene here
context.chat.last_message // stores the most recent user message
context.chat.message_count // tracks the total number of messages exchanged

// context.character property summary:

name // the character’s complete legal name (not editable)
chat_name // the display name shown during chat (not editable)
example_dialogs // sample lines the character might say (not editable)
personality // defines their tone, traits, and overall demeanor (editable)
scenario // describes the current situation or setting around them (editable)
